# Basic Markdown Tests

## Headings
# H1
## H2
### H3
#### H4
##### H5
###### H6

## Paragraphs & Typography
This is a standard paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, ***bold italic***, and ~~strikethrough~~ text.
Here is some `inline code` and an HTML passthrough: <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>C</kbd>.

<details>
  <summary>Click to expand</summary>
  This is a <mark>highlighted</mark> detail section.
</details>

This is a very long paragraph that should wrap multiple times. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

## Lists
### Unordered
* Item 1
* Item 2
  * Subitem 2.1
  * Subitem 2.2

### Ordered
1. First
2. Second
   1. Sub 1
   2. Sub 2

## Blockquotes
> This is a primary blockquote.
> > And this is a nested blockquote.
